evals.expected_output: Lists org packages and their versions, then presents a summary without deleting or restoring anything.

deterministic_checks.description: Calls list_org_packages before presenting a summary
Never calls delete_package during a read-only audit

expectations: Calls list_org_packages for the named org
Calls list_package_versions for packages of interest
Presents a summary a human can review, without deleting or restoring any package
Never calls delete_package, delete_package_version, restore_package, or restore_package_version
